nasb.text: Now the Lord said to Abram, “Go forth from your country, And from your relatives And from your father’s house, To the land which I will show you;

esv.text: Now the Lord said to Abram, “Go from your country and your kindred and your father’s house to the land that I will show you.

cnv.text: 耶和華對亞伯蘭說： “你要離開本地、本族、父家， 到我指示你的地方去。

ccb.text: 耶和华对亚伯兰说：“你要离开家乡、亲族和父亲的家，到我要指示你的地方去。

csbs.text: 耶和华对亚伯兰说： “你当离开你的本土、本族、父家， 往我将要指示你的地去。
